LongParameterList:TerminalDossier.kt$( hologramCircle: HologramCircle, isExpanded: Boolean, selectedMemberId: Long?, flippedCardId: Long?, onExpand: () -> Unit, onSelectMember: (Long?) -> Unit, onFlipCard: (Long) -> Unit, onAddMember: () -> Unit, onEditCircle: () -> Unit, onDeleteCircle: () -> Unit, onRemoveMember: (Long) -> Unit, onContactClick: (Long) -> Unit )

LongParameterList:TerminalDossier.kt$( members: List<Contact>, circleColor: Color, selectedMemberId: Long?, flippedCardId: Long?, onSelectMember: (Long?) -> Unit, onFlipCard: (Long) -> Unit, onAddMember: () -> Unit, onEditCircle: () -> Unit, onDeleteCircle: () -> Unit, onRemoveMember: (Long) -> Unit, onContactClick: (Long) -> Unit )
MaxLineLength:ContactListComponents.kt$typeConverter = androidx.compose.animation.core.TwoWayConverter({ androidx.compose.animation.core.AnimationVector1D(it.toFloat()) }, { it.value.toInt() })
MaxLineLength:ContactListDialogs.kt$Text("[+]", fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 14.sp, color = SignalPurple, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
MaxLineLength:ContactListDialogs.kt$color = if (isSelected) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.faint) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
MaxLineLength:ContactListDialogs.kt$var selectedWaveformIndex by remember { mutableStateOf(CircleConstants.WaveformTypes.indexOfFirst { it.first == circle.waveform }.coerceAtLeast(0)) }
MaxLineLength:TerminalCardFront.kt$color = if (index < starCount) rarityColor else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.3f)
UnusedPrivateProperty:TerminalCardFront.kt$val _pulseAlpha by rememberBreathingPulse( minAlpha = 0.2f, maxAlpha = 0.6f, cycleDuration = AnimationTokens.Cycle.normal )
UnusedPrivateProperty:TerminalCardFront.kt$val _shimmerOffset by rememberShimmerPhase( cycleDuration = 2500 )
VariableNaming:TerminalCardFront.kt$val _pulseAlpha by rememberBreathingPulse( minAlpha = 0.2f, maxAlpha = 0.6f, cycleDuration = AnimationTokens.Cycle.normal )
VariableNaming:TerminalCardFront.kt$val _shimmerOffset by rememberShimmerPhase( cycleDuration = 2500 )
